_comment: Known drone RF signatures mapped to frequency bands. Used by bridge.py for classification.

signatures.label: DJI Mini 2 / Mini SE
signatures.notes: OcuSync 2.0. Hops between 2.4 GHz and 5.8 GHz automatically. Remote ID via WiFi Beacon.

signatures.label: DJI Mini 3 / Mini 3 Pro
signatures.notes: O3 (OcuSync 3.0). Adaptive freq hopping. Remote ID broadcast at 2.4 GHz.

signatures.label: DJI Mini 4 Pro
signatures.notes: O4. Uses all three bands. 20 km range. Remote ID compliant.

signatures.label: DJI Mavic 3 / Mavic 3 Classic
signatures.notes: O3+. Triple-band. Up to 15 km. Used in professional cinematography.

signatures.label: DJI Air 3 / Air 3S
signatures.notes: O4. All bands active. Remote ID via WiFi at 2.4 GHz.

signatures.label: DJI Avata / Avata 2
signatures.notes: O3 / O4 FPV. Very high signal due to proximity flying style.

signatures.label: DJI FPV (1st gen)
signatures.notes: OcuSync 3.0. High-speed racing drone. Often flown at very low altitude.

signatures.label: Autel EVO II / EVO Lite
signatures.notes: SkyLink 2.0 / SkyLink 3.0. Similar freq usage to DJI OcuSync.

signatures.label: Skydio 2 / Skydio X2
signatures.notes: WiFi-based (802.11ac). Uses 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz. US military variant.

signatures.label: FPV Racing (ExpressLRS)
signatures.notes: ELRS 433/868/915 MHz control link. High update rate (500Hz+). Short to medium range.

signatures.label: FPV Racing (TBS Crossfire)
signatures.notes: Crossfire 868 MHz (EU) / 915 MHz (US). Long range RC link. Popular with FPV pilots.

signatures.label: FPV Racing (Analog 5.8 GHz)
signatures.notes: Analog video at 5.8 GHz + ELRS/Crossfire RC. Common in racing and freestyle FPV.

signatures.label: Parrot ANAFI / ANAFI Ai
signatures.notes: WiFi 802.11a/g/n/ac. 2.4 GHz and 5.8 GHz. Used by emergency services in EU.

signatures.label: Неизвестен RC дрон (433 MHz)
signatures.notes: Generic RC or hobby drone using 433 MHz ISM band for control.

signatures.label: Неизвестен RC дрон (868 MHz)
signatures.notes: Generic RC or hobby drone using 868 MHz EU ISM band for control.
